prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年最低位次约1923→1329→1104→1039，呈持续上升趋势（位次数字减小），近3年累计前进约884名，竞争逐年加剧；2025年基准约1039名；本省招生计划2022年17人→2023年16人→2024年16人→2025年21人→2026年17人，2026年较2025年缩招4人（-19%），缩招幅度较大，理论上竞争进一步加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2025年高考周期声誉偏正面（投档线稳步提升至211 第3、入选国家卓越工程师学院、保研率27%）；2026年周期出现实验室爆炸火灾事故，评价偏负面，可能轻微抑制报考热度；抖音热度总排名第61，评价一般；力学A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、航空宇航科学与技术A-、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、软件工程A-，共7个A-及以上学科，航空航天特色鲜明；211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第37名，近年排名稳定在35–37名区间，属全国顶尖理工类院校。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 学校位于江苏省南京市，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；宁夏考生赴东部沿海就读意愿较强，南 京作为热门城市对考生有吸引力；航空航天类、电子信息类、计算机类、人工智能等招生专业对应大类社会热度高热/推荐；本省2026年考生总数约66,000人（不确定），按历史比例估算物理类约44,550 人，与2025年基本持平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年缩招19%导致竞争加剧的主趋势、学校近年位次持续上升的惯性、2025年正面声誉的延续效应，以及2026年实验室 事故的轻微负面影响；预测最低位次约935名，区间795–1075名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 航空航天类
- 人工智能
- 电子信息类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 飞行器控制与信息工程
- 机械工程
- 机器人工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 物联网工程
- 交通运输。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间795–1075名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如795名以内）可重点冲刺航空航天类、人工智能等王牌专 业；位次接近区间上限（如1075名附近）建议以三档专业为保底，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 1923 → 1329 → 1104 → 1039, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative advance of about 884 places in the past 3 years, and competition intensifying year by year; the 2025 baseline is about 1039 places; the provincial enrollment plan was 17 in 2022 → 16 in 2023 → 16 in 2024 → 21 in 2025 → 17 in 2026, with a reduction of 4 places (-19%) from 2025 to 2026, a relatively large reduction, theoretically further intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation was relatively positive (the admission score line steadily rose to 3rd among 211 universities, selected for the National Excellent Engineer Academy, graduate school admission rate 27%); in the 2026 cycle, a laboratory explosion and fire accident occurred, with a negative evaluation, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin heat ranking is 61st overall, with average evaluation; Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Aerospace Science and Technology A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, a total of 7 A- and above disciplines, with distinctive aerospace characteristics; 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking is about 37th in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 35-37 range, belonging to the top national science and engineering universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, not a local university, with no local enrollment bias; Ningxia candidates have a strong willingness to study in the eastern coastal areas, and Nanjing as a popular city is attractive to candidates; majors such as Aerospace, Electronic Information, Computer Science, and Artificial Intelligence correspond to popular/recommended social hot majors; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 66,000 (uncertain), with an estimated 44,550 in the Physics Category based on historical proportions, roughly the same as in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the main trend of intensified competition due to a 19% enrollment reduction in 2026, the inertia of the school's continuous ranking improvement in recent years, the continuation effect of the positive reputation in 2025, and the slight negative impact of the 2026 laboratory accident; the predicted minimum ranking is about 935, with a range of 795-1075.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Aerospace
- Artificial Intelligence
- Electronic Information.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Aircraft Control and Information Engineering
- Mechanical Engineering
- Robotics Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Internet of Things Engineering
- Transportation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 795-1075, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 795), you can focus on aiming for top majors like Aerospace and Artificial Intelligence; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 1075), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options to ensure admission.

_translation.university_name_en: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics
